title: Russian Bean Pilaf
description: A hearty, comforting pilaf dish inspired by Russian cuisine, filled with the rich flavors of black beans and robust spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the robust pilaf mix and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the uncooked white rice, black pepper, salt, dried onion, and cumin powder.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the black beans and stir well.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Turn off the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
